content: Macadamia nut oil contains higher levels of monounsaturated fats compared to olive oil, making it more readily available to the body.
Macadamia nut oil has a 1:1 ratio of Omega-6 to Omega-3 fatty acids, ideal for the human body's balance, while olive oil has a 1:6 ratio.
Macadamia nut oil has a higher smoke point than olive oil, allowing for higher cooking temperatures without denaturing the fat.
Macadamia nut oil contains abundant phytochemicals that prevent oxidation, extending its shelf life compared to olive oil.
Macadamia nut oil has a richer nutty flavor suitable for baking, unlike olive oil.
